expectations.text: The output is saved to outputs/generated/prd.json.
branchName is derived from the feature title.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Workspace Member Management",
  "branchName": "workspace-member-management",
  "description": "Enable admins to manage workspace members and review changes.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add member invitation support",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to invite members by email so I can grant access without editing the database directly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can submit an email invite for a new member.",
        "Invite flow records membership state needed for later activation.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspaces/invite-member.*",
        "src/workspaces/member-service.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Change member roles",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to switch a member role between viewer, editor, and admin so access matches responsibility.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can change an existing member role to viewer, editor, or admin.",
        "Role updates persist and validate allowed roles.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspaces/change-member-role.*",
        "src/workspaces/member-service.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Revoke workspace access",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to revoke workspace access so former members no longer reach workspace data.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Admins can revoke access for an existing workspace member.",
        "Revoked members lose workspace access without manual database changes.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspaces/revoke-member-access.*",
        "src/workspaces/member-service.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Record membership changes in audit log",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want membership changes captured in an audit log so the system preserves a history of invite, role, and revoke actions.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Invite, role-change, and revoke actions append audit log entries.",
        "Audit records include actor, action, and timestamp details.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspaces/member-audit-log.*",
        "src/workspaces/member-service.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Show audit history in workspace settings",
      "description": "As a workspace admin, I want to review recent membership changes in the workspace settings page so I can audit access management activity.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Workspace settings page lists recent membership audit log entries.",
        "Audit list shows enough information to understand who changed which membership and when.",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/workspaces/settings/member-audit-view.*",
        "src/workspaces/settings/page.*"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover invite, role change, revoke access, and audit-log or audit-view work.

expectations.text: Dependencies point backward, batches are dense, and at least one batch contains parallel-safe stories.
